title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Knight Frank India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Knight Frank India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
